action.reasoning: Observation: Best test AUC 0.7254 with val AUC 0.7278, model still improving at epoch 30. Model has only 442K params - can easily scale up. Analysis: Model is underfitting - loss still declining, small model capacity. Decision: Scale up model (d_model=256, 3 layers) with slightly more dropout (0.3), train 60 epochs, and add a skip connection from skill embedding to output for better gradient flow.
